title: Multi-Agent Sales Lead Qualification and Consultation System
description: A reference implementation demonstrating a multi-agent voice architecture where specialized agents handle different conversation phases through seamless handoffs. Three agents—Qualifier, Advisor, and Closer—handle lead qualification, consultation, and scheduling while maintaining context through an orchestrator that manages transitions and summarizes conversation history between agents.

tools.name: schedule_followup
tools.description: Schedule a follow-up appointment with the lead

tools.name: record_satisfaction
tools.description: Record the lead's satisfaction level with the consultation

tools.name: handoff_to_next_agent
tools.description: Transfer the conversation to the next specialized agent
